name: Jumbo Sparks 'n' Splash Statue
description: A statue modeled after a certain famous "Spark Knight" of Mondstadt. It seems to capture her imposing figure as she is standing amidst bursting flames, reducing all things to ash.\nWho is the strongest in Mondstadt? Some would say it's the renowned Jean, while others would suggest Grand Master Varka, who is currently away on an expedition. However, in the hearts of some, the strongest of them all is that mysterious girl in red who wields the most powerful "treasure"...
